description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a landscaped plot, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored walls, with a prominent dark gable roof section over the main entrance and garage. The property includes a paved driveway, a swimming pool, and a variety of trees and shrubs arranged around the perimeter and within the yard. Large windows and glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The backyard area is open and includes a patio and outdoor seating, while the front is defined by a wide driveway and a formal entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern bungalow with flat and gable roofs, surrounded by landscaped greenery, a driveway, and a swimming pool. The design features large windows, a garage, and open outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, dark gable roof, garage, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the swimming pool, backyard patio, and additional greenery, with the flat-roofed section visible.
description_view_2: Driveway and main approach with a clear view of the garage, paved area, and symmetrical tree-lined entrance.
description_view_3: Rear/side view focusing on the backyard, pool, and open lawn, with the house's flat and gable roof sections visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
